name: Peppery Mozzarella Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 large Beefsteak tomatoes, cut into half
recipeInstructions:
1. Thinly slice cheese and tomato. Arrange on 4 small plates.
2. Cut avocado into thin slices. Arrange with cheese and tomato.
3. Separate shallots into rings and scatter over the salad.
4. In a screw-tipped jar, combine olive oil, lemon juice, sugar, salt, peppercorns, and oregano. Shake vigorously until well blended.
5. Spoon the dressing over the salad and let marinate for 1 hour.
6. Garnish with basil if desired and serve with warm crusty bread or bread sticks.
